words.zh: a. 列有標題的, 具有某種型別的頭(腦)或頭髮的

words.def: the upper part of the human body or the front part of the body in animals; contains the face and brains
words.zh: n. 頭, 頭腦, 領袖, 腦袋, 最前的部分

words.def: people who are no longer living
words.zh: a. 死的, 不活潑的, 麻木的, 熄滅的

words.def: an informal term for a father; probably derived from baby talk
a condition (mostly in boys) characterized by behavioral and learning disorders
words.zh: vt. 增加, 新增, 附帶說明, 計算...總和

words.def: have or possess, either in a concrete or an abstract sense
